title: Amendment to Third Schedule
text: NO.12012/06/2014-SR Ministry of Home Affairs (SR Section) ***** NDCC-II Building, Jai Singh Road, New Delhi, }( October 2015 OFFICE MEMORANDUM Sub: - Delimitation of Council Constituencies (Local Authorities Constituencies) Telangana, Order 2015 - regarding The undersigned is directed to refer to Election Commission of India's letter No.290/TL-LC/2015-BE/ 928-929 dated the 15h July 2015 on the subject cited above and to forward herewith a copy of the Notification{(S.O,2577(E) dated 21-09-2015} issued by this Ministry containing the Delimitation proposals for the Local Authorities' Constituencies of the State of Telangana in terms of sub-section (3) of Setion 24 of the Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2014 for information and necessary action. Encl: As above (A.K. Manish) Under Secretary to the Govt, of India Tel :23438180 To Election Commission of India (Kind Attn : Shri K. Ajaya Kumar, Principal Secretary) Nirvachan Sadan, Ashoka Road New Delhi-110001. Copy for information alongwith a copy of the aforementioned Notification to:- 1. Secretary, Legislative Department, Ministry of Law & justice, Shastri Bhawan, New Delhi. 2. Chief Secretary, Govt, of Telangana, Hyderabad. Copy also forwarded to:- Sr6.(IT Cell), MHA with the request to upload the aforesaid Notification in the website of MHA. (A.K. A r* r\ 4.1 I'^l •( 1^-1^1-4 -HI^IU F - . r-* •Midi +1 Hte^l 1 1 2 1 2 2 2 1 1 1 ?T^T f ^ T 3?T 22 * t 2015 ^T [H. 12012/6/2014- ir?T3ifT] 4012GI/2015 (!> -- 2 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SEC. 3(ii)| MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 21st September. 2015 S.O. 2577(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of section 24 of the Andhra Pradesh Reorganisation Act. 2014 (6 of 2014). the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the Third Schedule to the said Act, namely:— In the THIRD SCHEDULE, in PART li relating to the Delimitation of Council Constituencies (Telangana) Order. 2014. in the TABLE, for the heading "Local Authorities' Constituencies'" and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely :— Name of Constituency L Adilabad Local Authorines 2. Nizamabad Local Authorities 3. Karimnagar Local Authorities 4. Medak Local Authorities 5. Hyderabad Local Authorities 6. Rangareddy Local Authorities 7. Mahbubnagar Local Authorities 8. Nalgonda Local Authorities 9. Warangal Local Authorities 10. Khammam Local Authorities Note:— The extent of each of die above was comprised as on 22nd May. 2015.". "Lx)cal Authorities mentioned Extent of Constituency Constituencies Adilabad Nizamabad Karimnagar Medak Hyderabad Rangareddy Mahbubnagar Nalgonda Warangal Khammam Number of seats 1 1 2 1 2 2 2 1 1 1 constituencies shall be the territorial limits of the district in which it [No. 12012/06/2014-SR | KUMAR ALOK.
